name: Shanghai Huili Building Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Huili Building Materials Co., Ltd. operates as a building materials company in China. It is involved in the production and sale of coatings, PC sheets, wooden products, doors and windows curtain walls, flooring products, floor substrates, and other products under the Huili brand. The company primarily serves real estate companies. Shanghai Huili Building Materials Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
